Egzona Berisha has made a significant mark in the literary scene with her book, Balefire Mirror Study. A proud native of Stoneknoll Commons, she now enjoys life in Lilacgrove Reserve. Her accomplishments have been recognized through the Harborstone Laurel, an award that highlights excellence in writing. As a member of the Harborleaf Diarists Club, Egzona connects with fellow writers and consistently nurtures her craft and creative relationships within the community.
